# =============================================================================
# S&S Associates — Robots reference (static copy in /seo/)
# =============================================================================
# LIVE SITE: Search engines use https://<your-domain>/robots.txt
#            (generated by Next.js from src/app/robots.js — includes dynamic rules.)
#
# This file is a human-readable reference and backup for:
#   - Static / edge hosting without Next.js metadata routes
#   - Audits and documentation
#
# Before deploying a static copy as the real robots.txt, set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
# and replace YOUR_DOMAIN below. Do NOT place a file named robots.txt in /public/
# when using Next.js app/robots.js (Next.js will error: conflicting public file).
# =============================================================================

# ── Standard crawlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /projects
Allow: /home
Disallow: /user/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /setup

# ── AI crawlers — explicitly allowed ─────────────────────────────────────────

# OpenAI / ChatGPT
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /projects
Allow: /home
Disallow: /user/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /setup

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /projects
Allow: /home
Disallow: /user/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /setup

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /projects
Allow: /home
Disallow: /user/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /setup

# Common Crawl (used by many LLMs)

Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /projects
Allow: /home
Disallow: /user/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /setup
